text:
is a 1st year Attack Junior High School student.

Appearance

Boris wears a tired and sullen expression on his face most of the time. He has prominent bags under his hazel eyes, which look often uninterested. He has gray eyebrows and hair, and wears the standard Japanese middle school uniform.

Personality

Boris is a collected, mellow individual who does not usually engage in conversation. Judging by his involvement with the student council, he appears to at least care about his school enough to take part. 

Story

Boris attends a student council meeting.

Following the student council scandal, Boris listens to Marlo rant about the corruption in another one of their meetings.
